hypothesis: Training MEGAN and RootAligned with a class-balanced focal loss that weights each reaction template by the inverse effective number of its training instances will reduce the slope of top-10 accuracy versus log template frequency by at least 50% and at least double top-10 accuracy on Pistachio OOD, while altering Pistachio ID top-10 accuracy by less than 2 percentage points relative to cross-entropy baselines.
